title: Fireside Chat with Christopher Manning

you

yeah I think that was a real eye-opener

well in Rick and me but really lots of

on large amounts of digital text because

days we were only doing millions of

that there was this new way in which you

sorry latent the reach light allocation
which was an unsupervised method of

Multi clustering based on the words and
the hex which seemed a useful inductive

having taken this unsupervised method
and making it semi-supervised and so the
idea was that in many human domains
there's an existing classification so
the first thing we did on was across
science and so academia has departments

topics you know you can think of many
other areas such as in the biomedical

these classifications and so our idea

and then we can run it on documents and

in a document by then running it as an

sort of labeled classification problems

because I think there are just a lot of

interesting when I did some of the early
